title: Digital-Asset Treasury Companies Continue to Accumulate Crypto. But Are Any of Them Worth Buying?
author: Alex Carchidi
description: Digital-asset treasury companies like Strategy and Bitmine continue accumulating cryptocurrencies despite market downturns. However, the article argues these stocks are generally not worth buying for most investors due to overhead costs, debt service, dilution, and governance risks. Spot crypto ETFs with lower fees (0.2-0.3% annually) offer better alternatives for direct cryptocurrency exposure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Shares down 51% in 2026, trading at 0.97 mNAV (near break-even), and the article concludes DAT shares are not worth owning despite Bitmine's better position than Strategy.

title: 1 Company Now Holds Nearly 5% of All Ethereum. That's An Obvious Sell Signal
author: Reuben Gregg Brewer
description: BitMine has accumulated nearly 5% of all Ethereum through its stated strategy of building a massive cryptocurrency position. The author argues this represents a high-risk bet on a single asset backed only by belief in its value, with no underlying business fundamentals or physical assets. BitMine's stock price has tracked Ethereum's volatile performance, and the author recommends conservative investors avoid both the stock and cryptocurrency market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article presents BitMine as an overly aggressive, high-risk bet concentrated entirely on Ethereum with no underlying business fundamentals. The author explicitly recommends avoiding the stock, particularly for conservative investors, citing the risk that Ethereum could collapse to zero with no assets to recover value.

title: Liquid Gold: The AI Cooling Retrofit Trade
author: Jeffrey Neal Johnson
description: As AI chip density exceeds cooling capacity of traditional air systems, liquid cooling has become essential infrastructure. Alphabet's Brazos modular cooling system enables legacy data centers to retrofit without expensive overhauls, while specialized high-density environments require premium solutions. Vertiv, a leader in advanced thermal management, benefits from massive enterprise retrofit deployments and maintains strong pricing power with a $15 billion backlog.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Launching innovative Brazos cooling system that addresses critical infrastructure bottleneck; $180-190B infrastructure spend demonstrates commitment; strong Q1 2026 results ($5.11 EPS, $109.9B revenue) provide capital for expansion; open-sourcing design accelerates industry adoption

title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Announces Cash Dividend of $0.1056 per Share of 9.50% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies announced a cash dividend of $0.1056 per share on its 9.50% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock (BMNP), payable on July 10, 2026. The Bitcoin miner is deploying capital into Ethereum treasury operations and launched MAVAN, a staking infrastructure platform, in 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a regular dividend payment on preferred stock, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. Additionally, the company is expanding operations with new initiatives like MAVAN staking infrastructure and strategic Ethereum treasury positioning, indicating growth and innovation in the digital asset space.

title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Announces Initial Dividends and NYSE Listing for Series A Preferred Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies announced that its Board of Directors declared initial cash dividends on its 9.50% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock. The Series A Preferred Stock has been approved for listing on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker symbol 'BMNP' with trading expected to commence on June 16, 2026. The initial dividend of $0.316667 per share will be paid on June 22, 2026, followed by a second weekly dividend of $0.105556 per share on June 26, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced dividend payments and successful NYSE listing approval for its Series A Preferred Stock, demonstrating financial stability and investor confidence. The company is expanding operations with Ethereum treasury strategy and staking infrastructure (MAVAN), indicating growth initiatives and capital deployment.
